generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom, I always prioritize safety. That's why I support strengthening civil defense preparedness - it's about being responsible, not paranoid. My neighbor Sarah, a retired nurse, says she feels more secure knowing our community has basic emergency training. It's not about fear, it's about being prepared like we do for any other emergency. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
